TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sergio_Mattarella, title = Sergio_Mattarella, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sergio_Mattarella} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 7, Sergio Mattarella, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) Sergio Mattarella mrhuw Italy ta' misuw hya' ga Sergio Mattarella, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 7, Sergio Mattarella, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) Sergio Mattarella mrhuw Italy ta' misuw hya' ga Sergio Mattarella, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕerɣio mattarella, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) s~ɕerɣio mattarella mrħuw italj taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕerɣio mattarella, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
